name: Rodney Smith
bio: Rodney Smith is a vipassana meditation teacher who founded Seattle Insight Meditation Society. He trained as a Buddhist monk in the Theravada tradition and later became a hospice worker, bringing contemplative awareness to end-of-life care. He is the author of 'Lessons from the Dying' and 'Stepping Out of Self-Deception.' His teaching integrates the Theravada tradition with non-dual awareness.
